aweme_list.desc: 🎉 Exciting news! 🏠  The 100% no deposit mortgage is finally here! 🙌 Skipton Building Society has just launched this amazing product, exclusively available to first time buyers who are at least 21 years old and have a perfect track record of on-time rental payments over the last 12 months, within the last 18 months. 💯 The mortgage offers a five-year fixed rate at 5.49% until September 30, 2028, with no lender arrangement fee. The minimum loan is £5000, and the maximum loan is £600,000. However, early redemption penalties will apply during the first five years if you want to pay off the mortgage, with rates of 6%, 6%, 5%, 4%, and 1.75% in each of the first five years. ⏰ If you're interested in learning more about this fantastic opportunity, please drop us an email. You can find our contact details in our bio. 🔍  #mortgage #firsttimebuyer #homeownership #SkiptonBuildingSociety #realestate #homebuyingmadeeasy #mortgagetipsuk #mortgagetricksuk #mortgageratesuk #mortgageupdatesuk #mortgagebrokeruk #mortgageadviceuk #londonmortgagebroker #londonmortgageadvice #bestmortgagebrokeruk #mortgageuk #personalfinance #fintok  This video is not advice not advice. It and the comments in it are for information purposes only.   Think carefully before securing other debts against your home.   Your home may be repossessed if you do not keep up repayments on your mortgage.   You may have to pay an early repayment charge to your existing lender if you remortgage.   As with all insurance policies, conditions and exclusions will apply.   Not all Buy to Let mortgages are regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority.   Integer Advice Ltd t/a Lodestone is an appointed representative of Stonebridge Mortgage Solutions Ltd, which is authorised and regulated by the FCA.   Lodestone may charge a fee for mortgage advice. The precise amount will depend on your circumstances, but it will not exceed £599.
